text.title: code-review-slo-and-rubric Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the code-review-slo-and-rubric methodology end-to-end.

step.name: collect-throughput-data
step.action: Pull last 30 days of PR cycle time + reviewer load.

step.name: set-slo-from-baseline
step.action: Compute p50 + p95; set SLO at p50 + 20%, reviewer cap at p95 of open PRs.

step.name: author-rubric
step.action: List blockers + nits as binary criteria.

step.name: choose-ai-pre-review-tool
step.action: Pick mechanical-pass tool; document scope vs human pass.

step.name: validate-and-publish
step.action: Run validator; commit to team repo; announce.
